summary: Enthusiastic fan captures a magical first‑time experience with a standout Bertha and a heartfelt live vibe.
review: The reviewer relives their very first Dead concert at age 19, describing the show as an unforgettable trip and highlighting Jerry Garcia’s opening G‑C‑G strum on “Bertha” as a defining moment. No technical details about the recording are provided, but the emotional impact of the performance is clearly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review emphasizes a powerful personal experience and praises Jerry’s playing; recording quality is not addressed, so rating reflects strong show impression with uncertainty about audio fidelity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer focuses on overall emotional impact rather than set structure; no detailed commentary on pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Opening G‑C‑G strum of “Bertha” is highlighted as a pivotal, moving moment.
